memory.reply_template: {agent}: I keep coming back to this: {memory}

intent.reply_template: {agent}: My current focus is {focus}. My plan is {plan}.

reassure.reply_template: {agent}: Keep saying it plainly. It helps me stay oriented.

flash.title: State update
flash.content: Player reassurance lowered stress and raised trust.

follow_accept: I will come with you. Keep it clear and I will keep up.{claim_hint}
follow_accept_dominant: Fine. I will follow, but I am watching the shared resources and your decisions.{claim_hint}
follow_accept_careful: Okay. I will stay close to you. Please do not make me regret it.{claim_hint}
follow_accept_order: I will follow. But I heard that as an order, not a conversation.{claim_hint}
follow_refuse: Not yet. I need a better reason.{claim_hint}
follow_refuse_dominant: No. Not on trust alone. Tell me why first.{claim_hint}
follow_refuse_anxious: I cannot. Not while everyone is scattered and I am this scared.{claim_hint}
follow_danger_refuse: I will not walk into danger on that alone. {claim_hint}
go_accept: All right. I will go to {object_name}.
Okay. I will check {object_name}, but I am keeping my head clear.
go_danger_refuse: No. I am not going to {object_name} alone.
go_low_trust_refuse: I do not trust that enough to go to {object_name}.
player_follow_ack_target: Good. Stay close; I am still heading to {object_name}.
player_follow_ack_together: Then we stay together. I am following your lead.
player_intention_ack: Okay. I understand that as your intention, not as proof about the world.
keep_distance: I was not following you, but I will keep my distance.
hostile_dominant: Try it and this group becomes a courtroom with fists.
hostile_empathy: No. Stop. I will not let this become violence.
hostile_anxious: Back away. I cannot think while you are talking like that.
hostile_default: If this is a test, it is a cruel one. Back off.

direct_chat.dominance_food: {name}: I remember the supply count. Shared resources are trust made physical.
direct_chat.curiosity_mystery: {name}: Something here keeps forming patterns when we pay attention.
direct_chat.empathy_danger: {name}: Stay where I can see you. People get hurt when groups pretend they are fine.
direct_chat.afraid: {name}: Please tell me you heard that too. I do not want to be the only one scared.
direct_chat.angry: {name}: We need rules before fear makes them for us.
direct_chat.curious: {name}: This place is wrong in a way I can almost map.
direct_chat.tired: {name}: I can barely stand. Whatever this place wants, it can wait a minute.
direct_chat.default: {name}: I am still here. That has to count for something.

theories.curiosity: This place feels designed. Not haunted. Designed.
theories.dominance: The first real monster here will be bad accounting.
theories.empathy: The pressure is trying to push us apart. That is how people get hurt.
theories.default: Something here is arranging pressure on purpose.

resource_control: Nobody handles shared resources without saying it out loud first.
We count what keeps us alive before anyone improvises with it.
mystery_curiosity: If that place keeps changing when we notice it, then noticing is part of the problem.
I do not think the pattern is in the dark. I think it is in how we react to it.
danger_warning: Stay close. I am not treating panic in the dark.
If fear starts making decisions, we slow down and name it first.
need_pressure: I cannot ignore {urgent} much longer. It is at {value}.
{listener}, I need to deal with {urgent} before it starts speaking for me.
